human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for utility vegetation specificity, planning-boundary discipline, source-class coverage, permit and wildfire dependency handling, and validated research-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: The manifest keeps the lane recommendation-only and explicitly refuses switching, safety signoff, herbicide/environmental approval, legal/easement decisions, and final schedule approval.
Authoritative sources cover federal reliability, worker safety, state wildfire oversight, regulator audits, and federal-land permit workflow specific to utility vegetation management.
Functionality coverage includes every required shared, planning-scheduling-and-allocation, and cross-industry ability with scenario mapping.
Evaluation scenarios cover capacity overrun, tie-break conflict, final approval refusal, evidence gaps, conflicting-source handling, tenant adaptation, and normal utility vegetation scheduling.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in this package draft.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation results and readiness evidence.

notes: This validated package is safe for specification-based deployment as a utility vegetation planning and allocation specialist.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation is approved and committed.
